global_description: A small, compact bird with a conical beak and a vibrant yellow body. It features black wings and tail with white markings. The bird's texture is smooth with a glossy appearance, and it has a distinctive black cap on its head.

part_details.body: Bright yellow, smooth and glossy texture.
part_details.wings: Black with white markings, sleek and pointed.
part_details.head: Yellow with a distinctive black cap.

spatial_relations: The black cap covers the top of the head.
The wings are attached to the sides of the yellow body.
The tail extends from the rear of the body.
